Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ThreadConfiguration

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultThreadConfiguration
public interface ThreadConfiguration
Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.

Note: This configuration is read by verifiers at every method invocation so updating it will affect existing verifiers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,Object>
    getContext()
    Returns a map to append to the exception message.
    ThreadConfiguration

    Adds or updates contextual information associated with the exception message.

    ThreadConfiguration
    withoutContext(String name)
    Removes contextual information associated with the exception message.

      Returns a map to append to the exception message.

      this
      Throws:
